prompt: Create a cinematic pro-film photography portrait in a widescreen 16:9 frame. A glamorous vintage blonde woman stands at the far left edge of the composition, leaning against a vertical wall or window frame in deep shadow, with most of the frame occupied by an abstract dark teal architectural background. She has a large 1960s bouffant hairstyle in pale platinum blonde, bare shoulders, warm tan skin, gold jewelry including a chunky necklace and rings, and she holds a lit cigarette near her face with faint smoke drifting upward. Her face is deliberately obscured by a centered rectangular censor block in muted brown, covering the facial features while leaving the hair, hand, cigarette, neck, and shoulders visible. Use moody low-key lighting with warm sunlight grazing her hair and skin from the upper left, strong teal-and-gold color grading, shallow depth of field, soft film grain, subtle halation, and a still from a 1970s arthouse thriller or fashion editorial. The background should be minimal and out of focus, with dark geometric shadows, no text, no watermark, no extra people, and a tense, elegant atmosphere.
